meaning: n.菲尔德山(位于德国西南部)
examples: Consider adding a border, or using a red arrow instead of a simple black dot, Feldberg says.
A kite snowboarder takes a fall at the southern German Feldberg mountain on November 27, 2010.
Adding too many adjectives or big words, Feldberg says, will only serve to distract from the message.
Pirro-Feldberg had the new product on store shelves six months after the test ran.
Patricia Pirro-Feldberg, director of market research at Dannon in White Plains, New York, needed a quick read on what features were must-haves.
